ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula:
AND($User.LastName <> $Label.DataArchiverUser, NOT(ISPICKVAL(Account_Type__c,'')), OR(
AND( OR(RecordType.DeveloperName == 'SDA_Insolvency_Account', RecordType.DeveloperName == 'Canaccede_Insolvency_Account', RecordType.DeveloperName == 'Fidem_Insolvency_Account', RecordType.DeveloperName == 'SPL_Insolvency_Account', RecordType.DeveloperName == 'Scotia_Bank_Insolvency_Account'),
OR(ISPICKVAL(Account_Type__c ,'World Walmart Rewards Mastercard'), ISPICKVAL(Account_Type__c, 'Core Walmart Rewards Mastercard'), ISPICKVAL(Account_Type__c,'Home Equity Secured Mastercard')) ),
AND(RecordType.DeveloperName == 'Fairstone_Insolvency_Account', NOT(ISPICKVAL(Account_Type__c,'Unknown')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Account_Type__c ,'World Walmart Rewards Mastercard')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Account_Type__c, 'Core Walmart Rewards Mastercard')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Account_Type__c,'Home Equity Secured Mastercard')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Account_Type__c, 'Secured')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Account_Type__c, 'PL Unsecured')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Account_Type__c, 'PL Secured')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Account_Type__c, 'PL Auto Secured')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Account_Type__c, 'Retail')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Account_Type__c, 'Unknown - Not Walmart')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Account_Type__c, 'Auto Loans')) ),
AND(RecordType.DeveloperName == 'Goeasy_Insolvency_Account', NOT(ISPICKVAL(Account_Type__c ,'Leasing product')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Account_Type__c, 'Secured Personal Installment Loan')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Account_Type__c,'Unsecured Installment Loan')) ),
AND(RecordType.DeveloperName == 'Flexiti_Insolvency_Account', NOT(ISPICKVAL(Account_Type__c,'Private Label Credit Card')) )
) )
